title: A Film Project at College
article_text: A guy at my college wants to make a film series. He has a clear purpose for this project. The director can direct the actors well. We can see the success of his work tomorrow. I recognize a problem with the window in the room. The lack of light is a problem for the image. We depend on the department for some help. The team can gain a good review for their work. Some people argue about the drug use in the film. The race to finish the project never stops.

sentences.en: A guy at my college wants to make a film series.
sentences.zh: 我大学里的一个家伙想制作一个电影系列。

a school for higher education

sentences.zh: 导演能很好地指导演员。

sentences.en: The lack of light is a problem for the image.

sentences.en: The team can gain a good review for their work.

image_prompts: A young guy at a college campus holding a film camera, smiling.
A man pointing at a whiteboard with a clear plan written on it.
A director on a film set giving instructions to actors.
A group of people watching a screen showing a success message, with a calendar showing tomorrow's date.
A person looking at a broken window in a room, with a worried expression.
A dark room with a small window, and a camera showing a poor image on a screen.
A group of students talking to a department head in an office.
A team celebrating with a positive review on a laptop screen.
Two people arguing with each other, with a film poster showing a drug warning in the background.
Several people running in a race toward a finish line with a film project banner.
